about.label: About
about.heading: The Designer
about.name: Anmol Panjwani
bio: Creative and detail-oriented Interior Designer with experience in residential and commercial projects. Passionate about creating spaces that feel timeless, meaningful, and visually balanced.
I believe good design is not only about aesthetics but also about how a space makes people feel and experience their everyday life.
